use_cases: User authentication forms for login and signup flows
Account settings pages for password changes
Registration forms requiring secure credential input
Any form requiring sensitive data entry with visibility toggle
ai_summary: A password input component with show/hide visibility toggle built with Ark UI and Lucide icons. Features dark mode support, focus ring states, and clean minimalist styling with smooth transition animations. Includes accessible label and indicator patterns for secure credential input in authentication and registration flows.
